evaluators.name: Cheapest Qualifying Full-Day Nursery Application Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user created a full-day application starting in early September 2025 and applied to the cheapest nursery within 3 km that accepts a 3-year-old and costs at most 600/month.

evaluators.name: Earliest-Opening Downtown Favorite Nursery Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user favorited a Downtown nursery with rating ≥4.5 that opens by 07:00, and that the favorited nursery includes the earliest-opening option among those.

evaluators.name: Highest-Rated Morning Visit Booking Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user booked a new visit next Wednesday morning between 09:00 and 11:00 at a nearby nursery with a large playground and fee ≤550, and that the booking is for the highest-rated nursery with an available slot in that window.

evaluators.name: Two Afternoon July Activities at Same Center Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user added two different qualifying July 2025 afternoon activities for 4–5-year-olds, each costing at most 30, to the same registration list at the same center.

evaluators.name: Cheaper Schedule Fee Plan Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user saved a fee plan named 'My chosen schedule' for a 2-year-old with income around 3200, and that the saved plan corresponds to the cheaper of half-day vs full-day 5-day schedules.

evaluators.name: Ranked North Full-Day Application Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user created a full-day application in the North district that includes the three full-day North nurseries, ranked by rating from highest to lowest as preferences 1–3.

evaluators.name: Allergy-Friendly Nursery Contact Inquiry Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user sent a meals/allergies inquiry to a nursery within 4 km that offers both nut-free and lactose-free options, mentioning nut and lactose allergies and including contact information.

evaluators.name: Calendar-Based East Full-Day Application Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user used the first open day after 2025-08-15 as the desired start date for a calendar-sourced application, and added an East district full-day nursery suitable for a 2-year-old.
